title: Theo's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Theo plays peek-a-boo with his bedtime friends, discovering who's hiding behind curtains, blankets, and doors as he gets ready for sleep.

pages.text: Time for bed, little Theo! But wait... who's hiding behind the curtain?

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes standing in a cozy bedroom with a partially drawn curtain hiding something mysterious behind it
illustration.alt: Theo looking curiously at a curtain in his bedroom

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! It's Teddy Bear! He was hiding and waiting to say goodnight.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes pulling back the curtain to reveal a smiling brown teddy bear partially hidden behind the fabric
illustration.alt: Theo discovering his teddy bear behind the curtain

pages.text: Now who's under the soft blanket on Theo's bed? Someone is hiding there!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes approaching his bed where a mysterious lump is partially concealed under a blue blanket
illustration.alt: Theo looking at something hiding under his blanket

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! It's Bunny! She's keeping the bed warm and cozy for sleepy time.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes lifting the blanket to reveal a white stuffed bunny that was playfully concealed underneath
illustration.alt: Theo finding his bunny under the blanket

pages.text: One more friend is hiding! Can you see behind the bedroom door?

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes peeking around a partially open bedroom door with something hiding in the shadowy space behind it
illustration.alt: Theo looking behind his bedroom door

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! It's Mama! She's here for bedtime kisses and sweet dreams. Goodnight, Theo!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes being tucked into bed by his mama, with teddy bear and bunny partially visible under the covers in a warm, dimly lit room
illustration.alt: Theo getting tucked in by mama with his stuffed animals

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Who was hiding behind the curtain?
questions.explanation: Teddy Bear was hiding behind the curtain waiting to say goodnight to Theo!

questions.question: Where was Bunny hiding?
questions.explanation: Bunny was hiding under the blanket, keeping Theo's bed warm and cozy!

questions.question: Who came to tuck Theo into bed?
questions.explanation: Mama came from behind the door to give Theo bedtime kisses and tuck him in!
